title: Starter pack
description: Adds starter pack to your game
body:
**! TYPE /STARTERPACK TO GIVE YOURSELF A STARTER PACK IF USING SERVER PLUGIN !**

**Starter Pack** is a simple mod that gives you basic items when you first join a world. It helps you skip the boring part of punching trees and lets you start your adventure right away.

**What’s inside?**

**Stone Sword** — for fighting mobs.

**Wooden Pickaxe** — for your first stones.

**Leather Helmet & Boots** — basic armor.

**8 Bread** — so you don't starve on day one.

**Features**

- **Automatic:** Items appear in your inventory instantly

- **Balanced:** Good enough to start, but not too overpowered.

- **Simple:** Works with any other mod and doesn't lag the game.
